docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YATACO, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
